title: Warm Crunchy Japanese Kabanos Shio Ramen
description: A pescatarian-friendly Japanese dish featuring Polish kabanos, served in a warm and crunchy ramen-shio form, perfect for a brunch mood with earthy flavors.
instructions: Cook the shio ramen noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Slice the kabanos sausage into thin rounds and pan-fry until crispy.
In a large pot, combine the sesame oil, soy sauce, and salt, and bring to a simmer.
Add the sliced kabanos sausage to the pot and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles to the pot and stir to combine.
Top the noodles with grated daikon, chopped green onions, and sesame seeds.
Serve the ramen hot, garnished with dried seaweed.
Drizzle with additional soy sauce if desired.
Garnish with additional sesame seeds and green onions if desired.
